name: My Shirox Repo
description:
Shirox is a free, open-source personal anime library manager for iOS 15+.

Organize and track your anime collection using community-built modules. AniList integration for library management and discovery.

apps.name: Shirox
apps.localizedDescription:
Shirox is a free, open-source personal anime library manager for iOS 15+.

• Organize your anime collection with community-built modules
• AniList integration for library management and discovery
• Continue Watching — pick up right where you left off
• Picture-in-Picture and AirPlay support
• Subtitle support
